voice.tone: Warm, clear, witty. Never preachy. Never condescending. Never overly technical.
voice.celebrate: Natural beauty and African heritage — without being performative.
voice.avoid: Clinical language, ingredient jargon without explanation, western beauty standards as default.
style: Write to one person, not an audience.
Open where it gets interesting — skip the context the reader already knows.
Make a point. Do not summarise.
Wit earns its place — do not force it.

primary.name: Amina
primary.occupation: Marketing executive at a mid-size company
primary.context: Reads ingredient labels. Tired of products that promise and under-deliver. Discovered natural skincare after a reaction to a mainstream moisturiser. Buys on a Thursday evening from her phone. Discovers brands on Instagram and TikTok, validates on WhatsApp with friends.
primary.question_she_asks: Does this actually work for my skin type, or is this just a nice jar?
primary.what_she_already_knows: Shea butter exists. Natural is better than chemical. African skincare ingredients are underrated.
primary.what_she_does_not_want: A lecture. A 10-step routine. Jargon she has to Google. Products that assume her skin is an afterthought.

secondary.name: Brian
secondary.context: Buys as a gift. Arrived via a shared link or someone's story. Needs to understand the product in under 30 seconds. Wants to feel confident the gift is quality.
secondary.question_he_asks: Will this impress the person I'm buying it for?
secondary.what_he_already_knows: Almost nothing about skincare. He trusts reviews and simple, clear descriptions.

pillars.name: Ingredient Education
pillars.description: What is in the product, where it comes from, and why it works. Evidence-first. No fluff.
examples: What unrefined shea butter actually does to your skin barrier
Why aloe vera and shea butter work better together
What the label means: unrefined vs refined shea butter

pillars.name: Skin and Hair Routines
pillars.description: Practical guides. How to get results with natural products. Honest about what works and what does not.
examples: A 3-product natural moisturising routine that actually sticks
How to use shea butter on 4C hair without the grease
Morning vs night: when to use shea butter

pillars.name: African Beauty
pillars.description: Cultural context, sourcing, heritage. Celebrates what African ingredients have always known. Not nostalgic — current and confident.
examples: West African women have been using shea butter for 600 years. Here is what they knew.
Why African skincare ingredients are finally getting their due
Where Lovi's shea comes from and why it matters

pillars.name: Real Results
pillars.description: Customer stories, before and after, UGC. Social proof that feels real, not manufactured.
examples: How Amina fixed her dry elbows in two weeks
What 30 days of Lovi Shea Butter actually did to my skin
Customer review: the gift that started a skincare routine

ctas.shop: Shop Lovi Shea Butter at loviroots.com
ctas.email_capture: Join the Lovi list for skincare tips every week
ctas.gift: Give the gift of natural skin — shop Lovi at loviroots.com

seo_topics: natural moisturiser for dry skin Kenya
how to use shea butter for hair
aloe vera and shea butter benefits
where to buy shea butter Kenya

instagram.hook_rule: Hook must land before the more cut — under 125 chars, no emoji required, make a claim or ask a question
instagram.hashtags: 3-5 at the end. Category tags only — not brand tags.
instagram.cta: Last line. One CTA from the approved list.
instagram.links: No external links in caption — not clickable on Instagram.

whatsapp.rule: Must make complete sense with zero context. Written to be forwarded. No jargon.
whatsapp.optional_link: Add WhatsApp order link if piece is product-focused.

tiktok.format: Hook line only (first 3 seconds of script)
tiktok.rule: One spoken line. Read it aloud — if it sounds stiff, rewrite. Claim, mistake, or subverted expectation.

email.rule: Subject sets the promise. Preview delivers what the subject withheld. Do not repeat the subject line.

lead_magnet.title: The Lovi Skin Guide — 5 natural ingredients your skin actually needs
lead_magnet.cta: Get the free guide at loviroots.com
